MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-20-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MEWS SYSTEMS LTD RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SALESMACHINE, INC. $70,771.00 PRINCIPAL, $12,176.49 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $82,947.49, RE: CONFIRMED ARBITRATION AWARD. SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PETITIONER MEWS SYSTEMS LTD'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE MATTER IS NOT CONTESTED. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: MEWS SYSTEM'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $70,771.00 PLUS INTEREST AT THE STATUTORY RATE COMMENCING ON JANUARY 23, 2023. THE ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NOT PRESENT. (301/RCE)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Sierra J. Chinn-Liu, Esq. of Seyfarth, appearing for Petitioner Mews Systems LTD;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: PETITIONER MEWS SYSTEMS LTD'S Notice Of Hearing On Unopposed Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

The matter is not contested. Ms. Chinn-Liu appears to briefly address the proposed order and proposed judgment.

At the conclusion of counsel's comments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling:

Mews System's unopposed Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award is granted in the amount of $70,771.00 plus interest at the statutory rate commencing on January 23, 2023.

The order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Not Present. (301/RCE)
